hero.name: Joseph Marius Reyes
hero.summary: Building scalable web applications with ReactJS, PHP Laravel, and enterprise development experience in .NET technologies.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in ReactJS and PHP Laravel, with prior experience developing enterprise applications using .NET technologies.

I focus on building scalable, maintainable web applications, from backend APIs to modern frontend interfaces. I transitioned to ReactJS and Laravel because of their flexibility and efficiency in delivering high-quality software quickly.
My experience includes system architecture, database design, REST API development, and application deployment, allowing me to take ideas from concept to production-ready systems.
Alongside full-time development, I am open to freelance opportunities, helping businesses and startups transform ideas into reliable, scalable applications.

items.description: Develop and maintain full-stack web applications, building backend services and modern user interfaces while ensuring performance, reliability, and maintainable code.
Developed and customized WordPress websites, implementing themes, plugins, and performance optimizations to deliver functional and responsive web solutions.
